mapper.select: SELECT z.zone_id AS zoneId, -- (수정) 중복 방지를 위해 DISTINCT 추가 (한 작업자가 여러 로그를 가질 가능성 배제) COUNT(DISTINCT wl.worker_id) AS workerCount, 0.0 AS progressRate, -- 현재는 진행률 0.0 고정 'STABLE' AS status -- 기본 상태 STABLE FROM zones z -- 관리자가 배정한 구역의 작업자만 조인 (Role=WORKER) LEFT JOIN users u ON u.assigned_zone_id = z.zone_id AND u.role = 'WORKER' -- 그 작업자가 현재 출근 중(ended_at IS NULL)인지 확인 LEFT JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL GROUP BY z.zone_id ORDER BY z.zone_id

SELECT u.user_id AS workerId, u.name AS name, u.phone_number AS phoneNumber, ( -- 금일 처리한 작업 아이템 수 카운트 (속도 계산용 기초 데이터) SELECT COUNT(bti.batch_task_item_id) FROM batch_tasks bt JOIN batch_task_items bti ON bti.batch_task_id = bt.batch_task_id WHERE bt.worker_id = u.user_id AND bti.status != 'PENDING' AND DATE(bti.last_scanned_at) = CURDATE() ) AS workCount, 0.0 AS processingSpeed, -- 시간당 처리 속도 (미구현) 0.0 AS currentTaskProgress, -- 현재 배치 진행률 (미구현) 'WORKING' AS status, -- 작업 상태 (미구현) 'AVAILABLE' AS webrtcStatus -- WebRTC 상태 (미구현) FROM users u -- 현재 출근 중인 사용자만 조회 (로그가 없으면 조회되지 않음) INNER JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL WHERE u.assigned_zone_id = #{zoneId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT worker_id) FROM work_logs WHERE ended_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM issues WHERE status = 'OPEN'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM issues WHERE status = 'RESOLVED' AND DATE(resolved_at) = CURDATE()
